zh.title: 艾达币/美元技术分析：短期下行趋势偏弱整理
zh.content:
目前艾达币/美元价格维持在$0.236981附近，接近20日均线$0.23986715下方，显示短期承压迹象。24小时跌幅1.37%，价格波动受高点$0.240704和低点$0.236172限制，整体市场呈现弱势震荡格局。  

技术指标方面，MACD为-0.00056705996，虽然Signal不可用，但负值暗示空头动能仍在，但幅度有限，表明卖压并不强烈。RSI数据缺失，但结合价格走势及均线位置，市场可能处于超卖附近的修正阶段，多空力量暂时均衡。  

支撑位初步在$0.2362附近，若价格跌破该水平，下方可能触及$0.2345附近的次级支撑。阻力位在$0.2398附近，与20日均线重合，如能突破该区域，则可能短线反弹至$0.2425。价格区间操作仍是较优策略，关注支撑与阻力反复测试。  

交易建议上，短线偏谨慎，可考虑低位吸纳小仓位多单，止损置于$0.2350以下以控制风险。若价格回升并站稳均线之上，可逐步加仓。整体建议关注震荡格局内波动机会，避免追高或过度重仓。

en.title: Cardano vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ADA/USD remains under mild bearish pressure, trading at 0.236981 after a 1.37% decline over the last 24 hours. Price action is currently below the 20-period simple moving average at 0.239867, indicating that short-term momentum favors sellers. The session range between 0.236172 and 0.240704 reflects relatively compressed volatility, suggesting the market is consolidating while participants assess the next directional move. Unless buyers reclaim the SMA zone, rallies may continue to encounter resistance.

Technical indicators lean cautiously negative. The MACD value of -0.000567 shows bearish momentum remains present, although the absence of a signal line limits confirmation of trend strength. The negative MACD reading nevertheless suggests downside pressure has not fully dissipated. RSI data is unavailable, preventing assessment of overbought or oversold conditions. As a result, greater emphasis should be placed on price structure and moving average behavior when evaluating near-term market direction.

Key support is developing around the recent intraday low near 0.2362. A sustained break beneath this level could expose additional downside and potentially accelerate selling activity. On the upside, immediate resistance appears around 0.2399, aligning with the 20-period SMA, followed by the recent high near 0.2407. A decisive move above these levels would improve short-term sentiment and signal that buyers are regaining control of the market.

For traders, a cautious approach is warranted while price remains below resistance. Short-term participants may prefer waiting for either a confirmed breakout above 0.2407 or a clear rebound from support before initiating new positions. Risk management remains essential given the narrow trading range and uncertain momentum signals. Conservative traders may seek confirmation through increasing volume and stronger bullish price action, while active traders can monitor the 0.2362–0.2407 range for potential breakout opportunities.
